{{CargoRelic
|name=Silicon Life Prototype
|class_id=20342
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=In this metal shell hid a snail made of inorganic materials, with a simulated nervous system composed of a massive network of chips and circuits. Maybe through luck or chance, it can come into this world as a new advanced life form!
|fame=15
|art=11
|fth=17
|civ=16
|tech=31
|ss1=Wormhole refine time -1m
|ss2=Wormhole refine time -2m
|ss3=Wormhole refine time -3m
|ss4=Wormhole refine time -3m
|ss7=Wormhole refine time -3m<br> (Awakened)
}}
